title: Custom packet aggregates
description: A gathering place for multiple custom packets
body:
Adaptation modules and data packages for multiple modpacks
Here, the packets that I made or that I helped make will be placed here
![An old version of the Enchanted Golden Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d48c3969ad7fba6cad79005d88e78651bc806a70.jpeg)
